name: local-llama-server
description: Points at a llama-server running local journalist-tuned models. Cross-platform — runs on macOS (Apple Silicon or Intel), Linux, Windows. Zero network egress. Start with: `llama-server -m <path-to-gguf> -c 32768 --port 8080`. Use Qwen 9B for Mycroft-only workflows, Gemma 4 as the minimum local Spotlight lane, and Qwen3.6 27B when Mycroft also needs to run Spotlight.
